description_long: This is a striking, low-profile red sports car with a sleek aerodynamic body and aggressive styling. The car features a sharply contoured hood, prominent front air intakes, and angular headlights, giving it a modern and high-performance appearance. Its side profile reveals sculpted doors, large alloy wheels with low-profile tires, and a distinctive black accent running along the lower body. The rear showcases a prominent black rear spoiler, wide taillights, and a vented engine cover, emphasizing its mid-engine layout. The windows are tinted black, and the roofline is low and streamlined, enhancing its sporty character. The overall design suggests a high-end, performance-oriented vehicle suitable for urban and track environments.
description: A sleek red sports car with aggressive lines, black accents, and a prominent rear spoiler, featuring large alloy wheels and a low, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharply contoured hood, angular headlights, and wide front air intakes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted doors, large alloy wheels, and black side accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent black spoiler, wide taillights, and vented engine cover.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible wheel design and aerodynamic body lines.
